description: Flexbox: flex-grow equal columns, fixed basis + grow, gap, justify-content, align-items, inline span items, column direction.
visual_assertions: Three equal-width cards (flex:1) sit side by side with a gap between them.
A fixed 120pt column sits left of a growing column that fills the remaining width.
The justify-content:flex-end row pushes its two chips to the right edge.
In the align-items:center row, the short 'Centered' card is vertically centered against the tall card.
The three span chips (Left/Middle/Right) are separate items spread by space-between.
The column-direction section stacks two cards vertically with an 8pt gap.
